heading: Negotiation of price for technical data before development, production, or sustainment of major weapon systems
label: 4236 Negotiation of price for technical data before development, production, or sustainment of major weapon systems
text: The Secretary of Defense shall ensure, to the maximum extent practicable, that the Department of Defense, before selecting a contractor for the engineering and manufacturing development of a major weapon system, production of a major weapon system, or sustainment of a major weapon system, negotiates a price for technical data to be delivered under a contract for such development, production, or sustainment.
notes: Amendments2021— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 116–283section 2439 of this title2018—, substituted “, production, or sustainment” for “or production” in section catchline.Pub. L. 115–232, § 867(4)–(3), inserted “, to the maximum extent practicable,” after “shall ensure” and substituted “production of a major weapon system, or sustainment of a major weapon system” for “or for the production of a major weapon system” and “, production, or sustainment” for “or production”.Pub. L. 115–232, § 867(1)

Effective Date of 2021 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with additional provisions for delayed implementation and applicability of existing law, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 116–283section 1801(d) of Pub. L. 116–283section 3001 of this titleJan. 1, 2022

A, title VIII, § 835(a)(3)131 Stat. 1471Dec. 12, 2017“, United States Code [now ], as added by paragraph (1), shall apply with respect to any contract for engineering and manufacturing development of a major weapon system, or for the production of a major weapon system, for which the contract solicitation is issued on or after the date occurring one year after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Section 2439 of title 1010 U.S.C. 4236Dec. 12, 2017
